name: Autos Only Burien - Sales, Service, Rentals
description_short: Used auto dealership in Burien, WA offering vehicle sales, in-house financing for all credit types, service, and rentals since 2008.
description_long:
Autos Only, Inc. has operated as an independent used auto dealership in Burien, Washington since 2008. The company positions itself as a lower-cost alternative to franchised dealerships by maintaining reduced overhead while offering comparable services. Their business model focuses on serving customers across the full spectrum of creditworthiness through flexible financing options. The dealership maintains an in-house service department and reconditioning capability, allowing them to manage vehicle quality and offer extended service contracts directly to customers.

The company's primary services include used vehicle sales (inventory ranges from $4,000 to $30,000+), on-site financing for all credit profiles, vehicle trade-in valuation and acceptance, a full-service maintenance and repair department, car rental services, and the option to sell vehicles to the dealership. Their website features searchable inventory across multiple vehicle makes (Audi, Cadillac, Ford, Genesis, Hummer, Jeep, Lexus, Mercedes-Benz, Nissan, Tesla, Toyota, Volkswagen) and model years ranging from 2004 to 2023. Customers can apply for credit pre-approval online and schedule service appointments through their website.

Autos Only distinguishes itself through in-house vehicle reconditioning, which they claim reduces costs and maintains quality control. Customer testimonials highlight personalized service, patient staff, transparency in transactions, and willingness to perform additional work (such as windshield replacement at no charge). The dealership emphasizes a "care about our customers" positioning and maintains both sales and service staff on-site. Their extended service contracts and trade-in programs add revenue diversification beyond vehicle sales.

This company is primarily a used vehicle dealership, not a consumer finance provider, despite being miscategorized as "personal-loans" on CreditDoc. While they offer in-house financing, their core business is automotive sales and service. Consumers should approach this as a dealership that finances its own sales, not as an alternative lending platform. The company's credit approval criteria and financing terms are not disclosed on their public website, requiring direct contact.
pros: In-house vehicle reconditioning capability reduces costs compared to franchised dealerships
Financing available for all credit types, not limited to prime borrowers
Full-service repair and maintenance department for post-purchase vehicle support
Extended service contracts available to protect against future repair costs
Trade-in program allows customers to offset purchase price with existing vehicle value
Online pre-approval application and inventory search streamline initial shopping process
Consistent positive customer reviews highlighting personalized, patient sales staff and transparency
Car rental service available, adding flexibility for customers between vehicle purchases
cons: No financing terms, APR rates, or credit approval criteria disclosed on website
Dealership does not clearly distinguish between finance charges and vehicle pricing
Limited transparency about what "financing for all credit types" actually means or costs
Service department hours and rental service availability not specified on website
No information provided about down payment requirements or loan terms offered
best_for: Used vehicle buyers with varied credit profiles seeking in-house financing options
Customers in the Pacific Northwest needing both vehicle sales and maintenance services
Buyers seeking to trade in existing vehicles while purchasing used cars
Consumers wanting lower-cost alternatives to franchised dealership pricing
diagnosis: Autos Only is a used auto dealership offering in-house financing, not a consumer personal finance lender. It is best suited for used vehicle buyers in the Burien, WA area who need flexible credit approval and post-sale service support. The main caveat is that financing terms and rates are not publicly disclosed—customers must contact the dealership directly to understand costs and approval requirements.
services: Used vehicle sales (2004-2023 model years, $4K-$30K+ price range)
On-site financing for all credit types
Vehicle purchase from consumers (sell us your car program)
Inventory search by year, make, model, price, body style, and mileage
